title: Minecraft: Kingdom
description: A new way to experience Minecraft, with an attention to detail.
body:
Still in beta, expect regular updates
### **Recommend any combination of EMF+ETF+ESF for a better experience, but not required.**

A pack of vanilla texture and model overhauls, as well as new and unique features, with a focus on attention to detail and faith to vanilla's charm.
Get updates on my Twitter/X: [@Be_Troot](https://x.com/Be_Troot) or by joining the Resource Pack Community: https://discord.gg/yS2bhwNrAH.

**Features:**
- Updated block, item and entity textures
- Updated mob models (if EMF is installed)
- Biome dependent mob models, textures and sounds (if EMF+ETF+ESF are installed)
- More sound variety sourced from Minecraft Dungeons
- Optimised PNG file size with ImageOptim
- CTM nether portal (if Continuity is installed)
- Fresh Animations Support (Seperate Addon)

**Features currently being worked on. Expect them in coming updates:**
- Pixel consistent armour models w/Pigin helmets (Seperate addon)
- Handheld item models (Waiting for 24w46a itemstates to be released)
- Minecraft Dungeons style tools (Seperate Addon)

**Permissions:**
- You are free to use or showcase this pack in any monetised video
- You are free to modify the pack for personal use only
- You are free to make addons or patches for other mods/texturepacks, contact both me and the respective author first

Contact me on Discord for any questions: sadsquire
